This article applies to selling in: **United States**

# Amazon Stolen Goods Policy

Sign in to use the tool and get personalized help (desktop browser required).

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/sign-in?use_default_idp&redirect_to=%2Fhelp%2Fhub%2Freference%2Fexternal%2FGWSP3EWC23QNNEA2)

**The sale of stolen goods in Amazon’s stores is strictly prohibited. Failure to abide by this policy may result in loss of selling privileges, ineligibility for funds disbursement, and disposal of inventory in our possession.**

Amazon strives to ensure a trustworthy shopping experience for our customers. It is each seller’s responsibility to source, sell, and fulfill products that were lawfully obtained. Prohibited products include those that were obtained through shoplifting, theft, or any other illicit means at any point in the supply chain. As a seller, you must validate your supply chain.

By selling in Amazon’s store, you agree that:

*   You will not sell any products that are not legal for sale, including any products that have been unlawfully obtained through theft or other illicit means.
*   Failure to abide by this policy may result in removal of listings, suspension or termination of your selling account, ineligibility for disbursement of funds, disposal of inventory in our fulfillment centers at your expense, and other legal consequences.

For additional information, review the following pages:

For additional information, review the following pages:

*   [Responsible Sourcing documentation request requirements](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GGA969XZCZZPEVY5)
*   [Invoice requirements for appealing a policy violation](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GDQ9K277NYP6WNEW)
*   [Unsuitable inventory investigations policy](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/H4YYXNDRW9BSZEN)
*   [Funds disbursement eligibility policy](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/9RA9LYBJ3QP27M6)
